title: Code Review Assistant
prompt_text:
Review the following code for potential bugs, security issues, and performance optimizations. Suggest specific improvements:

`\n[CODE HERE]\n`
use_case: Review code for bugs and improvements

title: Generate Unit Tests
prompt_text:
Generate comprehensive unit tests for the following function. Include edge cases and error handling:

`javascript\n[FUNCTION CODE]\n`

prompt_text:

`

`
